headline: Align Technology's Q1 Earnings on Deck: Here's What to Expect
summary: ALGN's Q1 report looms with revenues seen rising 4.3% and EPS up 6.1%, as Invisalign demand and iTero adoption drive growth trends.

raw.headline: Align Technology's Q1 Earnings on Deck: Here's What to Expect

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Align Technology, Raises Price Target to $235
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Jason Bednar   maintains Align Technology (NASDAQ:ALGN) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $220 to $235.
